nodes.label: DESIGN.md - Generated Taste Standard Design System
nodes.norm_label: design.md - generated taste standard design system

nodes.label: Anti-Slop Design Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Overarching philosophy across multiple skills: actively break LLM default patterns like centered heroes, purple-blue gradients, Inter font, 3-column card rows, and generic AI design tells. Each skill defines specific banned patterns and preferred alternatives.

nodes.label: Typography Discipline - Banned Fonts & Premium Selection
nodes.rationale: Inter is banned as default in premium contexts. Prefer Geist, Satoshi, Cabinet Grotesk, Outfit. Serif banned in dashboards. Display: track-tight, weight-driven hierarchy. Body: relaxed leading, 65ch max-width. Monospace for data when density > 7.
nodes.norm_label: typography discipline - banned fonts & premium selection

nodes.label: Color Calibration - Palette Discipline
nodes.rationale: Max 1 accent color, saturation < 80%. BANNED: AI purple-blue neon, pure black (#000000), mixed warm/cool grays. Use neutral bases (Zinc/Slate) with singular high-contrast accents. One palette per project.

nodes.label: Three Dials System - DESIGN_VARIANCE / MOTION_INTENSITY / VISUAL_DENSITY
nodes.rationale: Shared config system across multiple skills. Three dials (1-10) control layout variance, motion intensity, and visual density. Default baseline: Variance 8, Motion 6, Density 4. Drives all downstream layout/motion/density decisions.
nodes.norm_label: three dials system - design_variance / motion_intensity / visual_density

nodes.label: Motion Choreography - Spring Physics & GSAP
nodes.rationale: Spring physics default (stiffness:100, damping:20). No linear easing. GSAP ScrollTrigger for pinning/scrubbing. Perpetual micro-interactions on active components. Animate only transform and opacity. prefer reduced-motion support mandatory.

nodes.label: Bento Grid Pattern
nodes.rationale: Asymmetric CSS Grid tile layouts. Prefer gapless with grid-flow-dense. Mix image-led and typography cells. 3-5 intentional cards better than 8 messy ones. Vary composition: alternate full-width rows, asymmetric tile sizes, vertical breaks.

nodes.label: Brand Identity System
nodes.rationale: Brand kit = visual argument for why brand exists. Logo must be simple, memorable, symbolic, scalable, ownable. Use monogram+meaning, product action, metaphor fusion, negative space, or construction geometry. Answer: what brand represents, core metaphor, logo expression, system scaling.

nodes.label: Image-First Workflow
nodes.rationale: Generate design images FIRST, deeply analyze them, then implement. One image per section. Never crop old images for detail - regenerate fresh. Images are the design source, code is the translation layer. Extract text, typography, spacing, colors, components.

nodes.label: Double-Bezel (Doppelrand) Nested Architecture
nodes.rationale: Cards look like physical hardware: outer shell with subtle background + hairline border + padding + large radius; inner core with distinct background + inner highlight + smaller radius. Creates machined, premium feel.

nodes.label: Industrial Brutalism - Swiss Print + Tactical Telemetry
nodes.rationale: Fuses Swiss typographic print with military terminal aesthetics. Rigid grids, extreme type scale contrast, utilitarian color (paper/ink or CRT phosphor), analog degradation effects (halftones, scanlines, dithering). Zero border-radius. ASCII framing. Two modes: Swiss Industrial Print (light) or Tactical Telemetry (dark).
nodes.norm_label: industrial brutalism - swiss print + tactical telemetry

nodes.label: Premium Utilitarian Minimalism
nodes.rationale: High-contrast warm monochrome palette, editorial typography, bento grids, ultra-flat components, muted pastel accents. Banned: gradients, heavy shadows, pill shapes on containers, Inter/Roboto/Open Sans, Lucide icons. Motion should feel invisible - gentle fade-ups, subtle hover shifts.

nodes.label: Hero Cleanliness Rules
nodes.rationale: Hero must fit initial viewport. Max 2-3 line headline, 20-word subtext. CTAs visible without scroll. No stats/badges/pills in hero. Left-text/right-image is overused default. Consider centered, bottom-left, stacked, or off-grid alternatives. Hero top padding max pt-24.

nodes.label: AI Tells Catalog - Forbidden Patterns
nodes.rationale: Shared catalog of patterns to avoid: neon glows, pure black, oversaturated accents, gradient text headers, custom cursors, Inter as default, 3-column card rows, generic names (John Doe/Acme), fake round numbers (99.99%), AI copywriting cliches (elevate/seamless/unleash), broken Unsplash links, emojis in code.
